metadata.name: Japan Briefing
metadata.description: Daily news briefing for the NYT Tokyo Bureau Chief

all.headline: トランプ氏 ホルムズ海峡安全確保へ日本などの艦船派遣に期待
all.description: ホルムズ海峡が事実上封鎖され、原油価格の高騰への懸念が高まる中、アメリカのトランプ大統領は、海峡の安全を確保するため日本を含む各国がこの海域に艦船を派遣することに期待を示しました。

all.headline: 旧優生保護法の被害補償 東京 広島など1都3県が個別通知
all.description: 旧優生保護法のもとで不妊手術などを強制された被害者への補償が進まない中、ことしから東京都や広島県など1都3県が、被害者に補償の対象となることを直接伝える、個別通知を始めたことが分かりました。

all.headline: 4億円強奪事件 容疑者関係先で現金約1000万円見つかる 報酬か
all.description: ことし1月、東京 台東区の路上で、中国籍や日本人のグループが4億円余りを奪われた事件で、逮捕された7人のうち、実行役とみられる暴力団員の関係先から、現金およそ1000万円が見つかったことが捜査関係者への取材でわかりました。指示役からの報酬とみられ、警視庁は、多額の現金が狙われたいきさつなど、事件の全容解明を進めることにしています。

all.headline: WBCきょう準々決勝 ベネズエラ戦 山本由伸など投手陣がかぎか
all.description: WBC＝ワールド・ベースボール・クラシック、日本代表は日本時間の15日、ベネズエラ代表との準々決勝を迎えます。先発の山本由伸投手をはじめとする日本の投手陣がベネズエラの強力打線を抑えられるかが勝負のかぎを握ります。

all.headline: 新宿 携帯電話買い取り店で強盗 現金約170万円など奪い逃げる
all.description: 14日夜、東京 新宿区の携帯電話の買い取り店に2人組の男が客を装って侵入し、店長に拳銃のようなものを突きつけて手足を縛った上、現金およそ170万円などを奪って逃げました。警視庁が強盗傷害事件として捜査しています。

all.headline: 中東からチャーター機で1100人余退避 政府“追加運航なし”
all.description: イラン情勢の緊迫化を受け、政府が手配したチャーター機で日本に退避したのは、これまでに1100人余りとなりました。政府は、現時点で帰国を希望する日本人の退避は終えたとして、当面チャーター機の追加運航は行わない方針で、モルディブに待機している自衛隊機を撤収させる方向で検討しています。

all.headline: オランダやベルギーでユダヤ系施設狙ったとみられる事件相次ぐ
all.description: アメリカとイスラエルによるイランへの軍事作戦が続くなか、オランダやベルギーではユダヤ系の施設を狙ったとみられる事件が相次いでいて、警戒感が広がっています。

all.headline: Just the beginning, says Chinese GP pole record-setter Kimi Antonelli
all.description: At 19 years, six months and 17 days Antonelli became the youngest Formula One driver ever to take pole position for a full grand prix.

all.headline: Japan and South Korea ready to act against forex volatility, ministers say
all.description: Finance Ministers Satsuki Katayama of Japan and Koo Yun-cheol of South Korea "expressed serious concern over the recent sharp depreciation of the Korean won and the Japanese yen."

all.headline: Japan industry ministry asks Australia to boost LNG output amid Iran crisis
all.description: Japan relies on the Middle East for around 11% of its LNG imports, with 6% shipped via the Strait of Hormuz.

all.headline: How China is wooing Paraguay’s political class away from longtime ally Taiwan
all.description: Paraguay is a tiny player on the world stage. But it is Taiwan’s last diplomatic ally in South America, making it a focal point for China's efforts to isolate the island.

all.headline: Japanese games and manga used in White House's airstrike videos
all.description: The videos have been criticized for making light of deadly attacks.

all.headline: Seven arrested over robbery of ¥423 million in Tokyo
all.description: Senior members of groups linked to the Yamaguchi-gumi and Sumiyoshi-kai crime syndicates were among those arrested.

all.headline: North Korea fires off barrage of around 10 ballistic missiles, Seoul says
all.description: The weapons traveled about 340 kilometers before landing outside Japan’s exclusive economic zone in the Sea of Japan.

all.headline: Clinical Japan confident of taking down Philippines at Women's Asian Cup
all.description: The highest-ranked team in the competition and the only Asian side to win the World Cup, Japan has been clinical so far with three wins from three games in the group phase.

all.headline: African countries consider ‘vice taxes’ to help fill USAID cuts
all.description: As the momentum for funding health initiatives slows down, African governments are exploring ways to minimize reliance on foreign donors.

all.headline: Over 200 evacuees from Middle East arrive at Narita Airport
all.description: The evacuees are Japanese nationals from Iraq, Kuwait, Bahrain, Qatar and Saudi Arabia, and non-Japanese family members, the Foreign Ministry said.

all.description: Critics say Xi's purges reveal a ruthless drive for absolute loyalty and total control of the military.

all.headline: The US may move some of its anti-missile system - and it's sparking unease in South Korea
all.description: Reports say the US may be moving parts of its Thaad system to the Middle East, despite Seoul's opposition.

all.headline: 'No-one will hire women' - India's top court rejects menstrual leave petition
all.description: The subject has polarised India for long, though some states and private companies offer menstrual leaves.

all.headline: Australian businessman found guilty of working for suspected Chinese spies
all.description: Csergo argued his reports did not contain any secrets but only information available on the internet.

all.headline: South Korea police raid transport ministry over Jeju Air crash
all.description: More inquiries into the incident have been launched, as investigators discover more body parts and victims' belongings.

all.headline: Rapper-politician Balendra Shah's party wins Nepal election
all.description: The Rastriya Swatatantra Party has won a large majority in an election dominated by issues including corruption.

all.headline: How Iran war laid bare the world's reliance on Gulf oil and gas
all.description: Countries around the world are feeling the impact of the conflict and the resulting energy price shock.

all.headline: KPop Demon Hunters to return as Netflix announces sequel
all.description: The sequel brings back the co-directors of the first film, which was a smash-hit for the streaming service.

all.headline: Qantas agrees to pay $74m over Covid-19 travel voucher refunds
all.description: The case relates to cancelled flights during the pandemic, for which customers were given credits instead of cash.

all.headline: Chinese national arrested over attempt to smuggle 2,000 queen ants from Kenya
all.description: The suspect had packed some ants in test tubes while others were concealed in tissue paper rolls, prosecutor says.

all.headline: How Indonesia's new sex laws will affect tourists
all.description: International travelers have been flocking back to the popular resort island of Bali as the Covid pandemic subsides, prompting hopes that Indonesia's battered tourism industry is on the road to recove

all.headline: Afghanistan
North Korea
This 'edible' plastic bag alternative could save Nara's sacred deer
all.description: A local entrepreneur in the Japanese tourist destination of Nara has developed an alternative to plastic shopping bags, to protect the town's sacred deer.

all.headline: The battle to save Sri Lanka's leopards
all.description: Having endured a bloody civil war from 1983 until 2009, Sri Lanka is now at peace and developing rapidly. That's good news for the country as a whole, but the island nation's leopards are under threat

all.headline: Wildlife is flourishing around Fukushima
all.description: Nearly a decade after Japan's Fukushima nuclear disaster, researchers have discovered that wildlife is thriving in the areas evacuated by humans, despite radiological contamination.

all.headline: China debuts 620 kph train prototype
all.description: China has revealed a prototype for a new high-speed Maglev train that is capable of reaching speeds of 620 kilometers (385 miles) per hour.

all.headline: A Shanghai building 'walks' to a new location
all.description: Shanghai residents passing through the city's eastern Huangpu district in October might have stumbled upon an unusual sight: a "walking" building.

all.headline: Self-driving robotaxis are taking off in China
all.description: The world has been inching toward fully autonomous cars for years. In China, one company just got even closer to making it a reality.

all.headline: Travel to Japan during Covid-19: What you need to know
all.description: If you're planning a trip to Japan, here's what you'll need to know and expect if you want to visit during the global coronavirus pandemic.

primary.headline: トランプ氏 ホルムズ海峡安全確保へ日本などの艦船派遣に期待
primary.description: ホルムズ海峡が事実上封鎖され、原油価格の高騰への懸念が高まる中、アメリカのトランプ大統領は、海峡の安全を確保するため日本を含む各国がこの海域に艦船を派遣することに期待を示しました。

primary.headline: 旧優生保護法の被害補償 東京 広島など1都3県が個別通知
primary.description: 旧優生保護法のもとで不妊手術などを強制された被害者への補償が進まない中、ことしから東京都や広島県など1都3県が、被害者に補償の対象となることを直接伝える、個別通知を始めたことが分かりました。

primary.headline: 4億円強奪事件 容疑者関係先で現金約1000万円見つかる 報酬か
primary.description: ことし1月、東京 台東区の路上で、中国籍や日本人のグループが4億円余りを奪われた事件で、逮捕された7人のうち、実行役とみられる暴力団員の関係先から、現金およそ1000万円が見つかったことが捜査関係者への取材でわかりました。指示役からの報酬とみられ、警視庁は、多額の現金が狙われたいきさつなど、事件の全容解明を進めることにしています。

primary.headline: WBCきょう準々決勝 ベネズエラ戦 山本由伸など投手陣がかぎか
primary.description: WBC＝ワールド・ベースボール・クラシック、日本代表は日本時間の15日、ベネズエラ代表との準々決勝を迎えます。先発の山本由伸投手をはじめとする日本の投手陣がベネズエラの強力打線を抑えられるかが勝負のかぎを握ります。

primary.headline: 新宿 携帯電話買い取り店で強盗 現金約170万円など奪い逃げる
primary.description: 14日夜、東京 新宿区の携帯電話の買い取り店に2人組の男が客を装って侵入し、店長に拳銃のようなものを突きつけて手足を縛った上、現金およそ170万円などを奪って逃げました。警視庁が強盗傷害事件として捜査しています。

primary.headline: 中東からチャーター機で1100人余退避 政府“追加運航なし”
primary.description: イラン情勢の緊迫化を受け、政府が手配したチャーター機で日本に退避したのは、これまでに1100人余りとなりました。政府は、現時点で帰国を希望する日本人の退避は終えたとして、当面チャーター機の追加運航は行わない方針で、モルディブに待機している自衛隊機を撤収させる方向で検討しています。

primary.headline: オランダやベルギーでユダヤ系施設狙ったとみられる事件相次ぐ
primary.description: アメリカとイスラエルによるイランへの軍事作戦が続くなか、オランダやベルギーではユダヤ系の施設を狙ったとみられる事件が相次いでいて、警戒感が広がっています。

primary.description: Japan relies on the Middle East for around 11% of its LNG imports, with 6% shipped via the Strait of Hormuz.

primary.description: Paraguay is a tiny player on the world stage. But it is Taiwan’s last diplomatic ally in South America, making it a focal point for China's efforts to isolate the island.

screenshots.name: Takaichi Sanae
tweets: Today, I attended the graduation ceremony, appointment and oath ceremony of the National Defense Academy. I would like to extend my heartfelt congratulations to all the graduates and their families.

Daichi Oguri won the silver medal in the men's snowboard banked slalom (SB-LL1/lower limb disability 1 class) at the Milan-Cortina Paralympics! 
Congratulations!

A government-chartered plane carrying a total of 222 Japanese nationals who were staying in Iraq, Kuwait, Bahrain, Qatar, and Saudi Arabia recently arrived at Narita Airport from Riyadh, the capital of Saudi Arabia. Thank you to everyone for your hard work on the long journey.

Momoka Muraoka won her second silver medal in the alpine ski women's giant slalom (seated position) at the Milan-Cortina Paralympics! Congratulations!

In both the first and second runs, he showed great concentration and bravely attacked.
